title: Dark Night
overview: The sickly heir to a thriving business sneaks out from under the watchful eyes of his supernatural caretakers.

title: Melancholy
overview: Running from a robber, Ichitaro stumbles on the scene of a grisly murder.

title: Herald
overview: Ichitaro's father asks him to supervise an unusual delivery from Nagasaki.

title: Compatibility
overview: The frail Ichitaro must solve a string of murders haunting Edo alongside his ghostly companions.

title: This World of Suffering
overview: A strange customer demands unusual medicine. Ichitaro shows him the mummy and gets a startling response.

title: One-sided Feelings
overview: Nikichi tells of his feelings for a spirit who refused to let death keep her from her human lover.

title: Love
overview: Ichitaro is missing, and an apothecary has been found murdered. Nikichi and Sasuke grow frantic.

title: Opportunity
overview: Murdered cats keep turning up at the Azumaya, and Matsunosuke finds himself under suspicion.

title: Acquaintance
overview: A drawing in a newspaper gives Ichitaro an idea about why people have been going after medicine dealers.

title: Fact and Fiction
overview: Eikichi is attacked on an errand for Ichitaro, forcing Ichitaro to reconsider his view of the case.

title: Whereabouts
overview: Ichitaro learns more about his own history and sets out to deal with the rogue spirit.

title: Yearning
overview: A fire at the Azumaya draws Ichitaro and Matsunosuke into a dangerous encounter.

title: Happily Ever After
overview: With the supernatural crime spree laid to rest, Ichitaro makes a momentous decision.
